message:
fix: ensure dog agent beads exist before dispatch mail (gt-r8m9)

Dog dispatch fails with 'no agent found' when sending mail to dogs
that lack agent beads. This happens when dogs were created before agent
bead support was added, or when bead creation failed silently.

Two fixes:
- runDogDispatch now ensures the target dog has an agent bead before
  sending mail, creating one if missing (idempotent via FindDogAgentBead)
- validateAgentWorkspace now handles 3-part addresses (deacon/dogs/<name>)
  as a fallback when bead lookup fails
